name: Karoon Energy Ltd
description: Karoon Energy Ltd is an ASX-listed international oil and gas exploration and production company with a portfolio of assets located in Brazil, the United States of America, and Australia. The company focuses on providing energy safely, reliably, and responsibly, aiming to be a leading independent international energy producer. Karoon operates with an entrepreneurial and innovative approach, managing offshore oil and gas projects while maintaining a commitment to sustainability, health, safety, and environmental stewardship for its stakeholders.
